name: Russian Tea Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix butter, sugar, vanilla, and almond extract together thoroughly.
2. Sift flour and salt together.
3. Blend all ingredients together, including the nuts.
4. Chill dough.
5. Roll into 1-inch balls.
6. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 9-10 minutes until set, not brown.
8. Roll in powdered sugar while still warm.
9. Roll again once more after cooling.
10. Triple recipe and do not overbake. The secret to moist tea cakes is to catch them when they are set (9 minutes).
